.file-embed.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(19, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(158, 158, 158, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(19, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(19, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.font-family: "??", Consolas, monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(250, 153, 205, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(84, 93, 204, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(224, 222, 113, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(83, 223, 221, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(19, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(19, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(56, 132, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(19, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: "??", Consolas, monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

mark.background: rgba(56, 132, 255, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(28, 32, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", Consolas, monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace
